calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, March 23, 2016, in Department 525:
Yao Hui Hu, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Willie Kon and with Cantonese interpreter Fion Hu, daughter who is also witness.
Faqiang Li, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

The clerk administers the interpreter's oath to Fion Hu to translate English language into Cantonese language and vice versa.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Mr. Hu testifies on his own behalf through Cantonese interpreter Fion Hu and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - 11/07/2015craigslist

Appellant/Defendant, Ms. Li testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1)- certificate of title (auto ownership)
(2) - 3/21/2016 craiglist/car values
(3) - Kelley blue book
(4) - release of liability
(5) - Kwan insurance services

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Judgment Entered
